title: Plants Registry
description: Master list of all plants managed by the system, including species info, location, irrigation, and profile references.

nextPlantNumericId.description: Auto-incrementing counter used to mint the next plant_NNN id.

plantId.description: Unique identifier for the plant, e.g. plant_001.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in reminders and reports.

speciesCommonName.description: Common name of the species in English, e.g. 'lemon'.

speciesScientificName.description: Latin binomial when known, e.g. 'Citrus limon'.

speciesConfidence.description: How confident we are about the species identification.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the plant.

locationId.description: Reference to a location in locations.json.

subLocationId.description: Reference to a microzone in microzones.json (may be null if not yet assigned).

indoorOutdoor.description: Whether the plant is kept indoors or outdoors.

irrigationMode.description: How this plant is watered: manually, via an irrigation system, or a mix.

irrigationSystemId.description: Reference to an irrigation system in irrigation_systems.json, if applicable.

attachedToIrrigation.description: Whether this plant is physically connected to an irrigation system.

irrigationEffectiveState.description: Runtime-computed effective irrigation state considering both attachment and system enablement.

wateringProfileId.description: Reference to watering profile in watering_profiles.json. By default profile IDs match the target plantId.

riskFlags.description: List of active risk flags, e.g. 'overwatering_risk', 'heat_stress'.

fertilizationProfileId.description: Reference to fertilization profile. By default profile IDs match the target plantId.

repottingProfileId.description: Reference to repotting profile. By default profile IDs match the target plantId.

pestProfileId.description: Reference to pest management profile. By default profile IDs match the target plantId.

maintenanceProfileId.description: Reference to maintenance profile. By default profile IDs match the target plantId.

healthCheckProfileId.description: Reference to health-check profile. By default profile IDs match the target plantId.

sharedWateringGroupId.description: Group ID for plants that share a pot or watering container.
